ham.subject: Update: Company Leave Policy Effective from May 1, 2024
ham.body:
Dear Team,

I hope this message finds you well.

Please be advised that the Company Leave Policy will be updated and will take effect on May 1, 2024. The key changes include:

• 1 additional paid day per quarter for senior management.
• Consolidated sick leave limits to a maximum of 10 days per calendar year.
• Introduction of a flexible leave request form available through the internal portal.

All employees are encouraged to review the full policy document attached to this email. If you have any questions or require clarification, kindly contact the HR department by replying to this message or using the dedicated HR chat line.

Thank you for your attention to this matter.

Best regards,

Rachel Thompson
HR Manager

spam.subject: Urgent: Your Income Tax Refund is Pending – Verify Now
spam.body:
Dear Taxpayer,

The Income Tax Department has detected a pending refund in your account for the fiscal year 2023-24. To process the refund, we require immediate verification of your personal details.

Please click the secure link below to confirm your information and avoid any potential delay or penalty:

<URL>

Failure to verify within 48 hours may result in the forfeiture of your refund and could trigger a review of your tax compliance status. This is a mandatory compliance step mandated by the Department.

Thank you for your prompt attention.

Sincerely,

Arun Patel
Tax Compliance Officer
Income Tax Department
